overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with red hair walking through Night City at night. The character traverses from a narrow graffiti-covered alley with neon billboards, past a homeless encampment, through an underpass, and onto a busy street with neon-lit storefronts before entering a plaza area with towering skyscrapers visible in the distance. The scene features characteristic cyberpunk aesthetics with teal and magenta neon lighting reflecting off wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow back alley with graffiti walls and digital billboards

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow alley with graffiti-covered walls, passing by illuminated digital billboards and vending machines

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking in the opposite direction past the character

entered.detail: large vertical digital billboard displaying a red and white mask advertisement in cyberpunk style
tall vertical neon-lit billboard with cyan and red colors mounted on building
tall blue building with red window frames dominating the end of the alley
green concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti and street art murals
illuminated white vending machine with digital display on the sidewalk
tall modern street lamp casting bright light on the wet pavement

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow cyberpunk alley at night, flanked by a green graffiti-covered wall on the left and illuminated digital billboards overhead. The alley is dimly lit by neon signs and street lamps, with a large blue apartment building visible at the end. A pedestrian passes by in the opposite direction as the character moves forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: homeless encampment with tents transitioning to covered underpass

events.description: character enters covered walkway under the highway overpass, lighting dims significantly

agents.ego_description: walking past a homeless encampment with canvas tents and people resting on benches, then entering a dark covered underpass

notable_agents.action: homeless person sitting on a concrete bench near the tents

entered.detail: canvas tents and makeshift shelters of a homeless encampment against the wall
concrete benches with people sitting and resting
palm trees in concrete planters lining the walkway
covered pedestrian walkway under the highway overpass with dark ceiling
large colorful mural painted on the right wall near the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the open alley into an area with homeless tents and palm trees, where people sit on concrete benches. The environment transitions into a dark covered walkway under an overpass, with graffiti murals visible on the walls. The lighting becomes significantly darker as the character enters the underpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy city street with neon storefronts and traffic overpass

events.description: character emerges from underpass onto busy city street with multi-lane traffic and neon signs
pedestrian density increases while walking past brightly lit storefronts and vending machines

agents.ego_description: emerging from the underpass onto a busy city street, walking along the sidewalk past neon-lit shops and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: cars driving on the multi-lane road below the overpass
pedestrian in bright pink jacket and green boots walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: busy multi-lane road with moving traffic and wet reflective asphalt
elevated highway overpass structure crossing above the street
commercial shops with bright neon signs in pink, cyan, and red colors
modern building with glass facade and horizontal neon lighting
purple-lit vending machine on the sidewalk near the storefronts

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the dark underpass, the character enters a vibrant city street illuminated by neon storefronts and overhead lights. The scene opens up to reveal a multi-lane highway with moving traffic below an overpass, while pedestrians walk along the sidewalk. The character passes by a glass office building and various shops with bright signage, including a distinctive pedestrian in a pink jacket.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with orange barriers leading to city center skyscrapers

events.description: character enters open plaza area with orange barriers and clear view of distant skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: walking through an open plaza area with orange barriers, heading toward the towering illuminated skyscrapers of the city center

entered.detail: bright orange concrete barriers and railings lining the plaza walkway
towering skyscrapers with illuminated windows and neon accents visible in the distance
low-rise modern building with yellow and gray facade at the plaza center
large digital billboard with animated content on the left side of the plaza

segments.scene_description: The character enters a spacious open plaza with wet reflective concrete and bright orange barriers guiding the path. The view opens up to reveal towering skyscrapers with neon lighting in the distance, marking the city center. The area is less crowded than the previous street, with scattered pedestrians and large digital billboards visible on the sides.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, neon-lit alleyway into the expansive, towering heart of a futuristic city center. It begins by following a red-haired character through a narrow corridor flanked by green graffiti and digital billboards, moving toward a large blue apartment building. As the character progresses, the scene shifts into a dim area of homeless encampments and palm trees before plunging into the deep shadows of a graffiti-covered underpass. The camera then emerges from the darkness into a vibrant, open street filled with bright storefronts, moving traffic on a highway below, and pedestrians in colorful attire. Finally, the environment expands into a spacious plaza with wet, reflective concrete and orange barriers, opening the view to a skyline of massive, neon-lit skyscrapers.
